creator: giffunip@asme.org
text:
The linux version of SPICE has a patch to support GNU READLINE. I tested
it an it works well except when you close the X-Window by clicking.
It seems nice to have this as an option, but I don't recommend it by
default.

Fix: # This patch was adapted from GNU/Linux, BEWARE IT HAS BUGS !!!!
# if you want to GNU readline use -DHAS_GNUREADLINE and link with -lreadline
#
How-To-Repeat: Add the following patch as patches/patch-rdln but don't activate the 
-DHAS_GNUREADLINE option.
